-- 1 of 6 --

Your Pre-Prelaunch, Part 5
!
Next I want to do something a little bit different, and show you this launch I had for my
JeffWalker.com blog.
!
This is really, really different because there actually was no product here at all, it's just
a blog.
!
I had never posted anything at JeffWalker.com, I had that domain for a while and I
didn't want to put a blog there.
!
Whenever I do anything in business, I always think in terms of sequences
and I always think about how can I build some buzz around us.
!
At the same point I didn't want to do a massive pre-launch because in the end I'm just
going to drop people on a blog. As much as I want my blog to be impactful and get lots
of traffic, and become a center of influence, at the end of the day it was just a blog.
!
I didn't want to have too much of an overblown pre-launch, but I still wanted some
good buzz. I thought about this for a while, and this is what I came up with.
!
This is an e-mail I've sent to my list, and I just said "I've got to be quick, it's a busy
weekend. I'm about to start a new blog, JeffWalker.com and I'm looking for a tag line.
If you come up with a winning tag line, I'll send you an iPad here's the details."
!
The beautiful thing about this is I actually sent this e-mail on the day the iPad was
released. This is the day where there was a huge buzz going on, everyone is talking
about the iPad.
!
"You 	can 	get 	one 	for 	free, 	if 	you 	come 	up 	with 	my 	tag 	line". 	I 	sent 	them 	to
winanipad.html and then down here I said "I haven't gotten my iPad yet, I'm still on
break with my family. A bunch of my buddies just got theirs, and they're raving about
them. Just give me a tag line for my blog, and I'll send you a fancy, 64 gigabyte wifi
iPad.”
!
This is the way I did a little shot across the bow, let them know something was coming.
The other thing it did was it got people very, very excited about my blog. This is the
survey monkey survey that people landed on when they click that winanipad.html link.
“Okay, this is your chance to win a free iPad and it's super simple.” The real hook here
was the free iPad. The hook to get them engage in the survey was the iPad.
!
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 2
PLF_Module4v1.0

-- 2 of 6 --

Basically I'm spending $600 or something like that, to invest that to get a lot of people
going through this process and get them excited about my blog and let them know
something was coming. Even though the blog has no revenue stream. It's important to
my business and I was, easily willing to invest that money.
!
“I couldn't seem to come up with a tag line for myself. To give you a little bit of
direction, here's some details about the blog. I plan on making my blog a major source
of internet market information and inspiration. Here's some of the stuff I'm going to be
covering and I'll give him some bullets of what I'm going to cover, product launches and
Product Launch Formula, online conversion...” going through all these different things
I'm considering publishing about..
!
“Since you're at this page you probably know a little bit about me”. I went ahead and
told them more about me. I've been marketing online forever, since ‘96. I created and
published Product Launch Formula, that's been very successfully used by thousands of
Product Launch Formula Owners. I'm pretty relaxed, I am totally embraced by the
internet lifestyle and I'm about as far from corporate as anyone you'll meet.
!
It's important to think about what I'm doing here, I'm giving them information so they
create this tag line for me. It's almost like I'm writing a testimonial for myself, and
telling them how great I am.
!
Think about this, ostensibly I am just helping them out, win this iPad by giving them
this information. I also have them thinking that I'm really cool, I've been selling stuff
online, thousands of successful real Owners.
!
Remember, I'm about two months from the launch of Product Launch Formula 3.0. This
is 	another 	deep 	way 	to 	be 	coming 	from 	different 	directions, 	different 	modalities,
different list.
!
I got the JV's...I got people, I'm asking people about my pre-launch content and ideas,
I'm doing a survey for my blog.
!
Here, I'm just giving some directions about the tag line, and telling them you can put
up to 10 suggestions. The winner will be selected by me, and it will be my sole
discretion and just giving 	some rules here, and then I ask them "what should the tag
line be?" The beautiful thing about this is I got 2,000 more than 2,000 separate
responses since each put in multiple suggestions. I got lots and lots of feedback but the
really important thing is, I put people in the situation of thinking very positive thoughts
about me.
!
The carrot was win an iPad, I have them thinking about me and my brand and the
strength of my brand in here and typing them here for me. Of course since I have them
on the survey, I couldn't just end it right there, right? After that, I came back and I ask
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 3
PLF_Module4v1.0
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 3 of 6 --

them one more question, what would you like me to cover on my new blog in the first
30 days.
!
This is just massive data gathering, remember I have more than 2,000 people go
through that survey. Now I ask them "what should I cover on this blog, what happens
here?" First of all I get lots and lots of great ideas for things to write about and to cover
it 	on 	my 	blog. 	The 	other 	important 	thing 	is 	I'm 	now 	tapping 	into 	the 	market
intelligence, and the stuff they write to me is full of all kinds of ideas for potential
products, for potential reports, also just sort of general objections to the overall
business.
!
This is just a fantastic data gathering opportunity and I'm not going to miss it, when
I've got people taking my survey. This is sort of along that line with a testimonial
cruncher, once people are filling out a survey. It's easier for them to just fill out another
question.
!
I don't like to have super long surveys, when you use really long surveys then you drive
down the response. Especially when you have a lot of questions on the first page of the
survey.
!
That's why I just had one simple question, and then after that I hit them with a second
similar question and that was it. These are two very, very important questions.
!
Of course, because I love sequences, I didn't want to leave it just sitting right there and
I came back with another e-mail to my list. Reiterating at the beginning that I've got
this contest for tag line, and get a new iPad and I'm giving them my quick update.
!
The responses were been staggering. As of right now, I had 1,704 people put in
suggestions. This is massive social proof. It show that people are really, really interested
in me and my blog and this whole contest thing. 1,704 people massive social proof.
!
You will notice I didn't round it off. You never want to round numbers off. I
went into survey monkey and there was 1704 responses that's specificity.
The more specific you are, the more powerful.
!
That's why, Ivory soap is 99 and quarter percent pure. That extra quarter percent
makes it a lot more impactful and a lot more believable when you're very specific.
!
Thank you, I'm showing some likability here by being really excited about the response.
I've asked people to stick to a limit of suggestions. Few of them have stuck in some
extras the total suggestions are now over at 10,000. It's a massive social proof, that's a
lot of suggestions but I've actually gotten through all of them.
!
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 4

-- 4 of 6 --

We've been narrowing it down to our list of favorites. This is an important paragraph I
am going through, all of them. It shows that I'm engaged with them, it shows that, it is
a conversation, and I'm actually paying attention to them. I'm going through all those
10,000 suggestions and paying attention, remember what reciprocity is, if you give
something to someone else they'll want to give something back to you. Here, I am
giving my attention we're building up a little bit reciprocity there.
!
I'm telling them, I'm making a final selection that they can still go ahead and put in a
suggestion, there's still time and then again another thank you I'm just blown away.
!
Just being likable can go a long way. The next one in the sequence is when I came
back, and told them that I've closed down the iPad contest. I've had over 2,000
different entries, and here we go that reciprocity again, 2020 to be exact.
!
Since most people are putting the maximum of entries, the total number of suggestions
is somewhere around 20,000. Again this is massive, massive social proof and showing
people are really interested in my blog. After going through them, I think I pretty much
got my tag line.
I'll be announcing the contest results when the blog goes live in a few days. Off course,
I'm going to use this contest to drive people to the blog when I go ahead and publish it.
!
From there, I really got into this base. What you just saw, was the shot across the bow,
in the Pre pre-launch. Now remember we're coming into both the blog launch and
Product Launch Formula 3.0 launch not too far away. This is sort of a list warming
process in here, I give them an e-mail that's very aspirational with soft teaching, about
being an entrepreneur. But it's not like a hard course.
!
This is really powerful stuff, that gets people all pumped up about their business. Of
course, some social proof here I'm talking about a friend of mine in a mastermind
meeting, Chris Knight, who is a person of influence the founder and CEO of Ezine
Article. Throwing a little bit of a social proof there, this is a list warming e-mail. We
come out with social proof, and then we go right into a list warming e-mail down here
and still looking for feedback from them.
!
I changed out the survey, now this survey drops people into a survey that's just asking
about what I should cover on the blog and then here, tease that the contest results are
going to be available soon.
!
Next e-mail to them was when the blog actually went live, again when you're looking to
influence someone. When it's launch day you give them a very short e-mail, not super
long involved e-mail in general, you just get out of the way.
!
You give them a a sentence to the link, a couple of sentences to a link and get out of
their way. This is how I send people to my blog, on the day that I launch the blog. Just
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 5

-- 5 of 6 --

to bring it full circle, here's the blog that I drop them on after I sent that last e-mail
with the super short e-mail with the link took them to this blog post.
!
This is the first blog post, it's a real relationship building, inspirational post. I came back
and I announced the winner of the iPad. I ended up getting so many responses I
actually became inspired and came up with the tag line myself. 	I ended up with
“powered by Internet Marketing”.
!
What I did was a drawing to give away the iPad and it was this Ricky Buchanan, which
was actually a fantastic story, it's really pretty cool.
!
Then I make good, this is all stuff and not terribly relevant to the pre-launch buzz but it
was keeping me likable.
!
I gave away the iPad and then I came back and had another contest.
That's how I launched the blog, one other thing I have 237 comments. I think it's pretty
unusual for most blogs on day one, to have 237 comments. I think we're in the Alexa
top 10,000 website for that launch day. This is an example of how you can do a launch
for something that's not even a product.
